name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-24
title: resolve-scope.py contract says exit 2 on invocation error but uses exit 1 for missing find-feature.py
description: contract.md states 'exit 0: success; exit 2: invocation error'. But resolve-scope.py line 40 uses sys.exit(1) when find-feature.py is not found (environment error). Either align the implementation to spec (use exit 2 for any invocation error) or update contract to document the distinct exit codes (1=env error, 2=arg error).

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-22 (exit code contract)
